positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest. Silhouetted trees, branches, and geometric cosmic elements (like nebula spirals and orbiting planets) fill the composition. The primary palette is deep indigo, electric cyan, and ethereal gold, emphasizing strong contrast against a slightly textured cream background. The style should evoke Art Deco meets Celestial Surrealism, using clean lines and repeating patterns suitable for an all-over apparel print. The composition is centrally balanced, focusing on a grand, overarching forest canopy. High contrast, vector graphic quality, perfect for printing.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, logo, watermark, noisy, dirty, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, copyright, messy lines, cartoon, photorealistic
